name: Contract Issue
about: Report a smart contract-specific issue

## Contract Name

Which contract is affected? (e.g., OnLoanHook, LendingPool)

## Function

Which function(s) are affected?

## Severity

- [ ] Critical — funds at risk
- [ ] High — protocol functionality broken
- [ ] Medium — incorrect behavior, workaround exists
- [ ] Low — minor issue, cosmetic

## Description

Detailed description of the issue.

## Proof of Concept

```solidity
// Add minimal reproduction code here
```

## Suggested Fix

If you have a suggestion for how to fix this issue.
